summary_description: Supplier 'CDW Corporation' is not found in the Supplier Master Data. This prevents verification of supplier status, authorization, insurance, and certifications.
failure_reasons: Supplier 'CDW Corporation' not found in Supplier Master Data (Policy 3.2.1)
Supplier status cannot be verified as supplier is unknown (Policy 3.2.2)
Supplier authorization for entity '1000' cannot be verified as supplier is unknown (Policy 3.2.3)
Required insurance missing: General Liability, Workers Compensation (Policy 3.2.4)
Required certifications missing: ISO 13485, FDA Registration (Policy 3.2.5)

field_level_assessment.detail: Supplier 'CDW Corporation' identified from quote and contract, but not found in Supplier Master Data.
Required insurance (General Liability, Workers Compensation) cannot be verified as supplier is unknown.
Required certifications (ISO 13485, FDA Registration) cannot be verified as supplier is unknown.

policy_reference: Supplier Master Data Policy §2.1; Category Insurance §3.3; Category Certifications §3.4
agent_recommendation: Supplier 'CDW Corporation' is not found in the Supplier Master Data. Initiate a new vendor onboarding process for CDW Corporation or verify if an existing vendor record exists under a different name. All subsequent checks (status, authorization, insurance, certifications) are blocked until the supplier is properly identified and active in the master data.
